name: appfigures
description: Reads Appfigures app-store reviews, products, analytics reports (sales/ratings/revenue/subscriptions/ads/estimates), reference data (categories/countries/languages/currencies/stores/SDKs), release events, connected external accounts, account users, and account info through the Appfigures v2 REST API, and manages release events and review responses.

risk.read: external Appfigures API read of app-store review, analytics, and account data
risk.write: external Appfigures API mutation — publishes a public review response, and creates/edits/deletes release-event markers overlaid on analytics charts
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes
